LAGNA AND OTHER HOUSES 29
At this juncture an explanation becomes necessary ; Saturn
is said to have two sons viz. Gulika and Mandi. There are
some authorities that make no distinction between the two.
There are yet some who do not recognize at all these two minor
planets. But the rising of Gulika is strictly avoided in Electional
astrology or Muhurta Sastra. Mandi's presence is needed for
verifying the ascendant and longevity according to MantrcJvara,
a reputed writer on astrology. The distinction between these
two minor planets (Upagrahas) consists in the fact that the
methods for calculating their rising periods are quite different.
